import httpx
import asyncio
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request

app = FastAPI()

BATCH_TIMEOUT = httpx.Timeout(10.0, connect=3.0)

@app.post("/api/enrich-users")
async def enrich_users(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()
    user_ids = [u["id"] for u in body["users"]]
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=BATCH_TIMEOUT) as client:
        tasks = [client.get(f"https://profiles.example.com/{uid}") for uid in user_ids]
        responses = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
    enriched = []
    for user, resp in zip(body["users"], responses):
        resp.raise_for_status()
        user["profile"] = resp.json()
        enriched.append(user)
    return {"users": enriched}

@app.post("/api/check-inventory")
async def check_inventory(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=BATCH_TIMEOUT) as client:
        tasks = [client.get(f"https://inventory.example.com/stock/{sku}") for sku in body["skus"]]
        responses = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
    results = [resp.json() for resp in responses]
    return {"stock": results}

@app.post("/api/send-notifications")
async def send_notifications(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()
    async with httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=BATCH_TIMEOUT) as client:
        tasks = [
            client.post(
                "https://notifications.example.com/send",
                json={"to": r, "message": body["message"]},
            )
            for r in body["recipients"]
        ]
        await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
    return {"sent": len(body["recipients"])}
